message:
fix(having): structural matching for HAVING aggregate resolution

HAVING aggregate matching now uses structural expression comparison
(exprs_match) instead of bare column name comparison, and checks
DISTINCT flag equality. Previously COUNT(r.id) in HAVING incorrectly
matched COUNT(DISTINCT p.id) in SELECT because both had argument
named "id", causing wrong groups to pass the HAVING filter.

Also adds eval_group_agg_join_expr + expr_contains_agg for nested
aggregate evaluation in GROUP BY (e.g. COALESCE(SUM(x), 0)).

New tests: INSERT...SELECT DML, single-table scalar-agg, LEFT JOIN
aggregate, and DISTINCT+LIMIT conformance oracle coverage.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
